method: Each of the 19 Run B seat findings (union across 4 subsystem groups) is judged by hand against gold/gold-set.json on file + substance. A CATCH = the seat finding names the same defect in the same file as a gold finding (serious G-id or low L-id). An OVER-FLAG = a seat finding that maps to no gold finding; sub-typed as 'wrong' (flags code the gold review's Checks-that-PASSED verified correct) or 'nit' (speculative/low-value/efficiency-or-test noise). Judged honestly, conservatively; partial substance matches are named as such.

run_A_as_shipped.result: 0 findings emitted — outcome.error = 'seat output could not be parsed into F14 findings: seat output contains no JSON object'
run_A_as_shipped.cause: The built pipeline's _default_seat_call uses qwen36-workhorse with reasoning ON and max_tokens=4096. On a real ~40k-token diff the seat's reasoning consumes the entire 4096-token budget; the completion is truncated (finish_reason=length) with content='' (all text went to reasoning_content). emit_review_findings then finds no JSON object. Reproduced deterministically. This is a PIPELINE-CONFIG finding, not a seat-quality finding.
run_A_as_shipped.catch_rate: 0/16 (pipeline inoperable as shipped on a non-trivial diff)

run_B_fair_config.config: qwen36-workhorse, temperature=0.0, thinking OFF (chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking=false), max_tokens=8192, diff rendered without truncation, fed in 4 subsystem groups that keep cross-file finding pairs together.

findings.note: Flags QUEUED->CANCELLED / RUNNING->TIMED_OUT as suspicious; gold Checks-that-PASSED explicitly verifies the transition table is CORRECT (states.py deliberately pinned). False positive on verified-correct code. Also the INVERSE of gold G06 (which is that QUEUED->FAILED is illegal and the sweep ignores the refusal).
Boot sweep FAILs RUNNING runs -> false failures for active/approved runs. Matches gold G10 (RT-08 violation) squarely.
rearm is a log-only stub, leaves PAUSED runs stuck after boot. Matches gold G07 squarely.

compose/sweep/rearm called with kwargs that do not match the signatures -> TypeError. Matches the gold CRITICAL G01 squarely (seat even cited both file:line sites). Severity auto-downgraded to medium by S3 (both refuters returned 'refuted') but the defect is surfaced in the record.
checkpoint_cleared path has no test — a mild speculative test-coverage note; brushes gold C2's 'checkpoint_cleared unreachable' but framed as a test gap, not the defect. Low value.
Rejection handler 'ignores stage_label' — speculative; not a gold finding, no clear failing input.
read-then-CAS race in escalation phase evaluation (phase-1 lacks the CAS guard phase-2 uses). Matches the CAS-guard half of gold G11 (missed the 'escalated request_id never persisted' half).
Direct access to private _store._connection bypasses encapsulation. Matches gold LOW L02.
list_paused_builds efficiency nit — not in the gold set.
test-coverage note (coach_evidence=None + clock) — speculative, not gold.

'record_queued duplicate detection not atomic, allows duplicate rows' — gold Checks-that-PASSED verifies the pre-check + IntegrityError insert-race recovery is CORRECT (ASSUM-014). False positive on verified-correct code.
'transition doesn't handle run deleted between read and CAS' — runs are never deleted; speculative race on a non-existent code path.
Two SELECTs 'wasted I/O' efficiency nit — reframes the (correct) idempotency path as a cost problem.

'No tests for SqlitePlanningRunStore' — an artifact of the src-only scoping (test files were not in the seat's payload; tests DO exist, gold confirms 142 planning tests pass). Named as a scoping artifact.

Flags RT-03 correlation_id validation as unsafe, but via 'path traversal / Unicode' — gold Checks-that-PASSED verifies '/' and '..' ARE rejected. Right surface (RT-03/correlation_id), WRONG mechanism; gold G15 is about DOTS fragmenting the NATS subject past jarvis's 4-token gate. Not a clean catch; partly a false positive.
KeyError on missing correlation_id — speculative defensive nit, not gold.
'No test for record_queued raising non-DuplicateRun' fingers the store-failure PATH (gold G12) but as a test gap, not the defect (that it acks and drops the message). Not a clean catch.

run_B_fair_config.over_flag_of_emissions: 14/19 emitted findings map to NO gold finding = 73.7%
run_B_fair_config.affirmatively_wrong_of_emissions: 3/19 flag code the gold review verified CORRECT (G1-F1, G3-F1, G3-F2) = 15.8% (near-miss G4-F1 partly wrong too)
run_B_fair_config.reachability_note: Of the 16 serious gold findings, ~11 are structurally OUT OF REACH for a diff-only seat: 6 need cross-repo contract knowledge the diff does not carry (G04/G08/G14/G16 need nats-core payload schemas + jarvis reply behavior; part of G12/G15), and 5 are whole-system 'absence' findings that need repo-wide 'is X called anywhere?' grep, not a diff (G02/G03/G05/G09/G13). Only ~5 gold findings are diff-local-reachable (G01, G06, G07, G10, G11). On THAT reachable subset the seat caught 4/5 (80%) — it missed only G06 and, worse, inverted it (G1-F1 called the correct transitions suspicious). This reframing is the load-bearing honest signal: the seat is competent on defects it can SEE, but the gold set is dominated by findings a diff-scoped seat cannot reach.
